rows.label: qev041302_MSG0001
rows.name:
A Gold Nopohippo Card, huh... I'd like
to see one of those myself just once.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041302_MSG0002
rows.name:
Well, I don't think you'll
find it very easily, but do
your best and search for it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041302_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Oh? Are you hoping to
trade Miracolle cards?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041302_MSG0004
rows.name:
I'm sorry, I don't really have any rare
cards, you see. It doesn't look like I
have anything to trade with you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041302_MSG0005
rows.name:
Hey, do you know about the trading cards
called the Mira Animal Collection?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041302_MSG0006
rows.name:
I saw the young kids buying them, so
I bought some myself despite my age.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041302_MSG0007
rows.name:
And I ended up getting completely
hooked on them. Nowadays, I'm
spending most of my salary on them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041302_MSG0009
rows.name:
What did you say, you're searching
for that legendary super rare...
Gold Nopohippo Card!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041302_MSG0010
rows.name:
Let alone gold, I haven't even
managed to get a silver one yet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041302_MSG0011
rows.name:
In the first place, the only thing I
could trade you for that Bronze Blatta
Card... is a Bronze Vasalt Card.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041302_MSG0012
rows.name:
Alright... the trade is established then!
I don't think the Gold Nopohippo Card
will be easy to get, but do your best![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041302_MSG0013
rows.name:
Is that so? Well, I don't think
the Gold Nopohippo Card will be
easy to get, but do your best![ST:wait ]
